series_metadata.series_description: Reports written about every facility that has a PCB inspection performed on it, written after the inspection. Includes infor mation on the PCB articles at the facility, PCB spills, cleanup and destruc- tion techniques, etc. May include Confidential Bus

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office 5 calendar years. storage at 5 calendar years. Scan electronic, readable media (CD-ROM) in storage. paper records scanning
